contradictions.description: Citation C-006 is fabricated; no locator or quote provided, and the draft excerpt is insufficient to verify the claim.

findings.text: Citation C-001 correctly references NAP-SRC-0010 for the tenancy agreement header.
Citation C-004 correctly references NAP-SRC-0022 for hardship fund payment date email.
Citation C-005 correctly references NAP-SRC-0012 for Monzo bank statement period.
Citation C-006 claims Equality Act 2010 reasonable adjustments duty but provides no locator or quote; it is fabricated.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Citation Audit Report

## Overall Result: FAIL

### Passed Citations
- C-001: Supported by NAP-SRC-0010.
- C-004: Supported by NAP-SRC-0022.
- C-005: Supported by NAP-SRC-0012.

### Failed Citations
- C-006: Fabricated; no locator or quote.
- C-002, C-003: Unsupported; rely on unallowed artifact art-a788d9fd8e8849dba5da5cf7a1ef238f.

### Recommendations
- Remove or replace C-006 with a valid authority citation.
- Verify C-002 and C-003 against allowed sources or obtain the artifact.
proposed_artifacts.title: Citation Audit Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-audit citations C-002 and C-003 after obtaining or verifying artifact art-a788d9fd8e8849dba5da5cf7a1ef238f. Confirm C-006 replacement with valid authority.
proposed_tasks.title: Follow-up citation audit for unsupported citations

risk_flags.description: Fabricated citation C-006 undermines draft integrity and may lead to false legal claims.
Unsupported citations C-002 and C-003 rely on an unallowed artifact; factual claims may be unverified.

summary: Audit of draft complaint citations reveals one fabricated citation (C-006) and two unsupported citations (C-002, C-003) relying on an unallowed artifact. C-001, C-004, C-005 are supported by allowed sources. Overall FAIL due to fabricated citation.

uncertainties.description: Citations C-002 and C-003 rely on artifact art-a788d9fd8e8849dba5da5cf7a1ef238f, which is not in allowed_artifact_targets; their support is uncertain.
